label: blue
groundingNote: one {urn:molecule-v0:color|color} [m]; when someone sees the {urn:molecule-v0:sky|sky} [m] when it is {urn:molecule-v0:day|day} [m], if there is nothing else in it, this someone sees it; when someone sees very much {urn:molecule-v0:water|water} [m] in one place, at many times this someone sees it
